Header.anime_description: Discover the latest and trending animes
Header.movies_description: Discover the latest and greatest films
Header.watchparty_description: Watch movies and TV shows with friends

Footer.note: This site does not store any files on our server, we only linked to the media which is hosted on 3rd party services.

Home.foryou_tooltip: An AI uses the content you've already watched in your account history to recommend new things for you to watch. Your recommendations update every 24 hours. The more movies and series you watch, the more accurate the recommendations become.

Search.hero_description: Search through thousands of movies, TV shows, and anime series
Search.no_results_description: We couldn't find any results for "{keyword}". Try adjusting your search or browse our trending content.

PageNotFound.desc: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you were looking for. To return to Cineby homepage click on the button below

InternalServerPage.heading: Internal server error
InternalServerPage.desc: The server is down. We are working towards creating something better. Won't be long...

ContactUS.heading: Contact us
ContactUS.desc: We offer several ways to contact us. You can use any of the following methods to get in touch with us:

Livestream.title: Live Sports
Livestream.description: Watch your favorite sports live in high quality. Never miss a game again.

Ads.ads_help_message: Ads help us keep our site running and provide you with free content. We appreciate your support!
Ads.confirmation_message: Are you sure you want to disable ads? Ads help us keep the site running. As an alternative, you can visit fmovies.cat which has only 1 ad per session.
